title: No Gui Evolution
description: What  you have done will improve your abilities in which areas .
body:
Are you tired of tedious skill trees and complex bonus systems?

If so, you can try this mod。

Without a complex skill tree, whatever you do, you will improve
No GUI interface, everything is calculated based on statistical information
Fighting monsters will increase your damage to them
Mining minerals will increase your mining speed
Frequent going into the sea will improve swimming speed
Long distance exploration will increase your speed

1.1.0 updata ↓

The number of chimes will change the size of the sound
Climbing distance will increase climbing speed
Being illuminated as damage will increase damage absorption

1.2.0 updata ↓

Added forgetting function
After a period of time you will slowly forget your skills
Because the GUI has been removed, there are no screenshots to preview

1.3.0 updata ↓ 

You can use sqrt to customize numerical growth
